topic: Endometriosis affects 1 in 10 women — most go undiagnosed
caption: 🚨 1 in 10 women suffer from endometriosis, yet most go undiagnosed. 💔 Endometriosis is a condition where tissue similar to the lining of the uterus grows outside the uterus, causing pain, infertility, and heavy bleeding. 🌟 Learn the signs and symptoms to watch out for. 📝 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💖 #EndometriosisAwareness #WomensHealth #HealthRecode
